headline: Citigroup shares fall 4% on report of potential regional bank deal
summary: Investing.com -- Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) shares fell 4% Friday after Bloomberg reported the bank is considering acquiring a regional lender.

headline: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on PNC Financial Services Gr, Lowers Price Target to $263
summary: Oppenheimer  analyst Chris Kotowski   maintains PNC Financial Services Gr (NYSE:PNC) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $284 to $263.
